snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun​ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Click here to watch:

Prelude of Pushparaj: https://youtu.be/gbcpEbr6ECA

Uppena Deleted scene: https://youtu.be/TZGY-HJNt5g​​

#AA20​​ Movie Launch : https://youtu.be/cs_drz6Ps5I​​

snippet.title: Great for the good | ft. Rahul Dravid | CRED
snippet.description:
Hi, this is Rahul Dravid writing the description for this video.
Sorry, I lost my temper there. I am meditating these days. 

Well, I am just writing this to let you know that CRED truly rewards you every time you pay your credit card bills on time. They are good people. Become a CRED member to discover this for yourself: https://app.cred.club/k63y/thewall​

Also, if an ‘Ajay’ from the red SUV who overtook me at the signal on 8th April 2021 is reading this, meet me there again in a week’s time. I’ll be waiting.

snippet.title: OH SANAM - Tony Kakkar & Shreya Ghoshal | Hiba Nawab | Anshul Garg | Satti Dhillon | Hindi Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Oh Sanam by Birthday Boy Tony Kakkar & Melodious Shreya Ghoshal ft. Hiba Nawab. 


Song Name: Oh Sanam
Singer: Tony Kakkar & Shreya Ghoshal
Music: Tony Kakkar
Lyrics: Tony Kakkar
Programmed & Arranged by Aakash Rijia & Tony Kakkar
Guitars - Shomu Seal

Featuring: Tony Kakkar & Hiba Nawab.

KITNA NAAZ KARTE HAIN TU SANAM HAMARA HAI

TERE BINA NAHI MERA GUZARA HAI 



OH SANAM MERE HUMDUM TU KITNA PYARA HAI

HAZARON DAFA DIL KI LI HAI TALASHI

TUM HI MILE HO HAR BAAR YAARA

TERI MOHBBAT NE JEENA SIKHAYA HAI

TERE LIYE ISHQ SARA KA SARA

OH SANAM , hai tera karam

Hua tujhse ishq dobara hai

OH SANAM MERE HUMDUM TU KITNA PYARA HAI







Hai baadal hai baarish

Dil ki guzarish

Baras jaane do

Karta Chand sifarish

Tu TAAJ MERA, TU  Tajmahal hai

MERE LABON PE HAI TU WO ghazal hai

Oh sanam , milo har janam

RAB ka bhi ye ishara hai

OH SANAM MERE HUMDUM TU KITNA PYARA HAI

Lyrics:

Jado koi hiqq naal laau sohniye,
Tenu pakka cheta  mera aau sohniye,
Gore gall nu jo la k ditte chawa na tweet,
Koi zulfa hta k galo laau sohniye,
Mera pau ga plekha baar baar,
 
Dassi j koi kare ni tenu mere vangu sohniye pyaar,
 
 
Mere baare ta zaroori ohnu dasse gi,
Man rovega tera te utto hasse gi,
Ohne tenu khaas kade chauna nai,
Vaada tere naal ma v mud auna nai,
Chatt labb jande ajj kall yaar,
 
 
Dassi j koi kare ni , Tenu mere wangu sohniye pyaar 
 
 
Kheda jazbaata naal aam jaiya galla ne,
Khore tenu mere lai bnaya nai c allah ne,
Zind lekhe laayi bhora kitta na lihaaj,
Haye Rakhi na rkaane hun dhillon kolo aas,
Tera sarda asi v la ge saar ,
 
 
Dassi j koi kare ni , tenu mere vangu sohniye pyaar.

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 1 | UPSC - Optional Me Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

As a UPSC Aspirant, choices are always tough when you have to select the subjects. But choices become even tougher when it's your last attempt and you are considering changing the optional subject. Abhilash is facing a dilemma. What will he do? Make the touch choice or just go with the flow? What do his friends have to say about it?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever present ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja

UPSC fact #53: UPSC subject options are so confusing, they inspired a few of Imtiaz Ali’s film’s characters.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

snippet.title: MOVING HOUSES || House tour || What's up with us - Leo&Fam
snippet.description:
Hey everybody,

Sorry that it took this long to upload a video here. 
Honestly, life's been chaotic!!! We are doing great right now and hope you guys are staying safe and well too... You all know we shifted houses recently but we realise you didnt get what the hell and heaven has happened and why we were shifting all of a sudden!? A lot of you wanted a house tour and some of you just wanted to know what's been up at our end. I really hope this video gives all the answers :)

Love,
Leo&Fam!

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

localized.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
localized.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

snippet.title: Echipaadd Full Video | Noel Sean Feat Dethadi Harika | Vinay Shanmukh | Megisto | Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
#Echipaadd 

All My Songs Are An Inspiration From Life & People Around, This Song Will Hold A Special Place In My Heart For  All The Experiences I Have Been Through.
I Believe The More Darker It Gets The More Brighter We Shine!
Echipaadd Is An Answer To Many Questions 

Love 
GangStar!

This Song Goes Out To All My Gangstars Who Loved & Supported Me All My Journey Till Date & Ofcourse To Harikas Fans Too!!!

Much Love
Noel Sean!

#NoelSean #AlekhyaHarika #Infinitum #VinayShanmukh #Noel #TeluguRap #Gangstar #DethadiHarika 

Echipaadd Credits:
Concept, Composition, Lyrics & Rap -  Noel Sean Alekhya Harika
Director, DOP, Edit & DI - Vinay Shanmukh
Music - Megisto
Styling - Navya Marouthu
Studio / Mix - Vinay Kumar
Recording Engineer  - Rakesh 
Produced By Noel Sean & Infinitum
Asst DOP - VFX  : Suneel reddy
Co.Director.   : Manu alluri 
Hair & Makeup : Thimmappa 


Echipaadd Lyrics - 

Gangstarrr..!! Lets Go...

Just One Life...
Make It The Best 
Evademanna Kick It To  Dust
khastam Nashtam Competition 
Evadikaina Common Eee
khastapadithe Success Kuda Avotundi Nee Mistress Leee
nothing Is Permanent Except Your Confidence
Bongukuda Panikiravu Buildup & Showy Things
Tene Chuttu Thigeyle 
Money Chuttu Manushule Paina Paina Premale
Raktam Thage Snehale 
Chal Chal Chal Chal Mamaa Kaiku Kartha Thu Drama 
Chill Chill Chill Chill Mama Lokam Antha Full Drama 
KICK IT HARD....
KICK IT HARD....
Sing With Me
Echipaadd Yo!!!
Echipaad Yoo!!!

Dethadi Groove...
Move It Girl
I Like That...
Bring It On...
Let's Go............!

Life Antha Ankele
Ankella Sankelle 
Paddavo Thiruddi Doolathrichi Potundi...
Yavadi Sothu Kaadu Eedi ... Mayajalam Anathidi 
Chedavo Thirudi 
Manasuni Mingivestundi
Nuvvento Nuvve Telusuko..
Anni Adupulo Pettuko
Pottaku Thindi 
Kaantiki Nidra 
Thalapai Needa
Preminche Manushuloo Neetho Valle Untaroo
Migitha Antha Bogusuu...
Nothing Really Matters Dude

SING WITH ME.....

Echipaadd Yo!!!
Echipaadd Yo!!!


Dethadi Groove
Move It Gal
I Like That
Bring It On...

Let's Go......!


Money, Love Sex & Game PDA Is So Lame......!
Nijamina Prema Neekunte Ee Show Off 
Prema Avasaram Lee...
Premanna Maate Sachipoyindi...
Athiga Vadesi Ruchi Poyindi...
Porilu Kuda Thakkuvem Leru..
Vaalu Vadithe Teere Veeru
Chakkarloo Kottiste Chakkarle Vastayi
Rendu Chethulathone Kada Chappatlu Vastayi..
Full ga Vadesi Friend Zone Chesi 
Manchodu Manchodu Ani Pichoodini Chesi
Solo Kings Nee Driver lani Chesi
Oorantha Thippi Tisi Needi Pippi 
Chese Ninnu Fruitu 
Chetikiche Flute...
Orchestra Ke clChupinche Routeuu..
Saddest Day Whattta Gloomy Night...
Vayinchu Chinna Pi Pi Pi 
Vayinchuuu Chinna Pipipipi

Chuck It Boy!
Echipaadd Yo!!!!!
Echipaadd Yo!!!!!
Dethadi Groove
Swing It Gal
Lets Go......


Gangstar...Noel Sean...!
Dethadi..Harika Yoo...!
Echipaadd...................!

snippet.title: தமிழ்ப் புத்தாண்டு அன்று கனி காணுதல் | வாங்க வேண்டிய 2 முக்கிய பொருட்கள் | தமிழ் வருடப் பிறப்பு 2021
snippet.description:
சித்திரை மாதத்தில் பிறந்தவர்களும், குழந்தை பெற்றவர்களும் பார்க்க வேண்டிய பதிவு | Desa Mangayarkarasi
https://youtu.be/XxAB_XVBMZo

மருத்து நீராடி தமிழ்ப் புத்தாண்டை வரவேற்று வழிபடும் முறை | கனி காணுதல் | தமிழ் வருட பிறப்பு
https://youtu.be/0g00MJwEQNw

செல்வம், ஆரோக்கியம், நீண்ட ஆயுள் பெற தமிழ்ப் புத்தாண்டை வரவேற்று வழிபடும் முறை.   மேலும் கனி காணுதல், அறுசுவை உணவு படைத்தல், வழிபடும் நேரம் என பல தகவல்களை திருமதி. தேச மங்கையர்க்கரசி அம்மா அவர்கள் அளித்துள்ளார். 

- ஆத்ம ஞான மையம் 

# சித்திரை கனி காணுதல் 
# தமிழ் வருட பிறப்பு 
# Tamil New Year
# தமிழ்ப் புத்தாண்டு

snippet.title: રાજકોટમાં મુખ્ય મંત્રી વિજય રૂપાણી લોકડાઉન વિશે શું બોલ્યા?
snippet.description:
ગુજરાતમાં કોરોના વાઇરસના કેસ સતત વધી રહ્યા છે.

snippet.title: Jhoom | Episode 1 - Be Right Back | Marathi Webseries | @Bira 91 Merch Store  #bhadipa #bira91boom
snippet.description:
Gaurav and Isha's sibling banter has grown with their age! As Gaurav plans a late-night outing, Isha is all set to participate with her suggestions and instructions. But what happens when the plan turns around and mom becomes the plot twist? Watch this episode to find out! 
Jhoom is our new webseries that takes you on a twisted journey of youth, fate, family, friends and chaos. Join along for this fun ride as we release a New Episode, every Sunday. Subscribe to #Bhadipa to get all the alerts.

mr.title: झूम | एपिसोड १ - शून्य मिनीटांत आलो | वेब सिरीज | #bhadipa #bira91boom
mr.description:
त्यांच्या वयासारखीच, गौरव आणि इशाची भांडणं सुद्धा वाढली आहेत! गौरव ने केला आहे रात्री उशिराचा बेत पण ईशा तिच्या सूचनांनी करत आहे त्याला लेट. काय होणार जेव्हा आईला कळणार त्यांचे उपद्व्याप? जाणून घेण्यासाठी हा भाग शेवटपर्यंत पाहा.
झूम ही आमची एक नवीन वेब सिरीज आहे. मित्र, कुटुंब, आणि गडबड-गोंधळ ह्या सर्वांनी भरपूर असा हा अनुभव नक्की घ्या. घेऊन येत आहोत एक नवीन भाग  प्रत्येक रविवारी. म्हणूनच #भाडिपा ला सबस्क्राईब करा. 

श्रेयावली

कलाकार
आई - विभावरी देशपांडे
बाबा - सुनील अभ्यंकर
छोटा गौरव - अर्णव कल्कुंद्रे
छोटी ईशा - अर्वी मुरकुटे
गौरव - गंधर्व गुळवेलकर
ईशा - तृष्णा चंद्रात्रे
रेवा - कृतिका देव

दिग्दर्शन - ओमकार जाधव, अभय राऊत
निर्माते - सारंग साठये,पॉला मॅकग्लेन, अनुषा नंदकुमार
नाटक आणि कथा - वरुण नार्वेकर
पटकथा - सई हवल, प्राची हंकारे
संवाद - वरुण नार्वेकर, सई हवल, प्राची हंकारे
एक्झिक्युटिव्ह प्रोड्युसर - प्राजक्ता सालबर्डे
छायाचित्रण संचालक - चैतन्य पुराणिक
संकलन - अनुजा भंडारे
साऊंड डिझाईन, सिंक साऊंड आणि मिक्स - सौरभ मोरगावकर, समीर तंबोली
रंगभूषा आणि वेशभूषा - आशिष हेमंत देशपांडे
संगीत दिग्दर्शन - ए. व्ही. प्रफुल्लाचंद्र
कला दिग्दर्शन - मयूर पवार, अक्षय आंबेडकर
कलरिस्ट: कुणाल तिवारी
ब्रँड आणि सेल्स हेड - स्वानंद तेंडुलकर
पहिला सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - राजीब रावल
सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - अभिप्राय कामठे, पृथ्वीराज चव्हाण
लाईन प्रोड्युसर - तेजस लिमये
प्रोडक्शन असिस्टंट - रोहन खरे
पहिला एसी आणि फोकस पुलर - बडे कृष्णा
कास्टिंग - ओमकार जाधव, अभय राऊत
लोगो डिझाईन टायटल ऍनिमेशन आणि वी.एफ.एक्स. - इंविमोल्ड पिक्चर्स
वेशभूषा सहाय्यक - हर्षदा आंबेडकर
रंगभूषा सहाय्यक - उमेश जाधव
क्रिएटिव्हस् - प्राजक्ता नेवाळकर
फायनान्स आणि अकाऊंटस्- आदित्य देसाई
बी. टी. एस. - ओमकार कुडाळे
टीम सॅनीटायझेशन - पार्थसारथी वडगावकर
वी.एफ.एक्स. टीम - प्रतीक उमाळे, जयराज वारती
स्पॉट - संतोष मांपेडी, प्रवीण तरी
केटरिंग - हॉटेल ग्रीन सिग्नल, पुणे
लोकेशन - शिवनगरी सोसायटी
लोकेशन करटसी - पराग आणि सुप्रिया वडगावकर
उपशीर्षक - प्राची हंकरे
ट्रान्सपोर्ट - सागर राऊत, स्वप्नील भोसले
कॅमेरा वेंडर - अकॉर्ड एक्विप, पुणे
कॅमेरा अटेंडेंट - नागेश शिंदे, जितेंद्र सिंग
 लाईट वेंडर - आयडीयल सिने इक्विपमेंट्स
लायटिंग टीम - बंटी साळुंखे, पप्पू साळुंखे, महादेव शिंदे, योगेश वानरे, दीपक राजपूत
प्रॉप मॅन - नितीन आर्ट्स, उमेश मुळे
ग्राफिक डिझाइन - व्हिजन ग्राफिक्स
कला टीम - रशमिकांत सलावी, अंकुश मालेकर, महेश कुऱ्हाडे, सचिन चासकर, अमोल कानडे, राजकुमार शर्मा, रामहारक विश्वकर्मा
सोशल मीडिया टीम - अनिकेत जाधव, पूजा परब, तन्वी कुलकर्णी, रिचा जावळेकर

snippet.description:

Idea Subscribers Dial :- 53712420176
Voda Subscribers Dial :- 53712420176

Lyrics :-
Tere sare chethe khol deye tere yaare pyara ne, 
Fher kya ki dekh bat bulale ghar k tharya ne, 
Tere sak ka kida na mit ta kare mind kharab mera, 
Fher sachi sach bta de kit se tanka fit tera, 

Re lucha gunda jar nahi su sun le sani mai, 
Mane kunsi chodi kasar bta teri sewa pani mai, 
Tu jhuth kare darame sari duniya n bera, 
Fher sachi sacha bta de kit se tanka fit tera, 

Meri re re mati kar rakhi tu kisa log r, 
Es ghar wase te tang aagy m lelu jog r, 
Ja manjeet panchal ban baba tu laale ne dera, 
Yo bahu akbar pur aala chalya rakhiye dyan tera, 
Fher sachi sach bta de kit se tanka fit tera,

snippet.title: Stylish Star Allu Arjun Speech At Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First Meet Event | Sukumar | DSP
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First meet on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​​ #PreludeOfPushparaj​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj​ #AlluArjun​​ #Rashmika​​ #Faasil​ #Sukumar​​ #DSP​ #MythriMovieMakers​​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Click here to watch:
Introducing Pushpa Raj : https://youtu.be/Lk2oDvoonUc
Prelude of Pushparaj: https://youtu.be/gbcpEbr6ECA

snippet.title: Ahlan Ramadan | Hussain Salafi | "നമുക്ക് മാറ്റം സാധ്യമാണ്" | Ramadan Speech Malayalam | LIVE
snippet.description:
🌙 ആത്മ ശുദ്ധീകരണത്തിന്റെ ദിനങ്ങൾ വരവായി...
മാറ്റത്തിനുള്ള പ്രതിജ്ഞകൾ ഉണ്ടാകണം..
ജീവിത സമീപനങ്ങളിൽ മാറ്റവും വേണം..
💠 ആവശ്യമായ മുന്നൊരുക്കത്തോടെ റമദാനിനെ വരവേൽക്കുമ്പോഴാണ് ആത്മീയാനുഭൂതിയോടെ നമുക്കതിനെ സ്വീകരിക്കാൻ കഴിയുക..

✅ സ്വർഗ്ഗകവാടങ്ങൾ തുറക്കപ്പെടുന്ന, നരക കവാടങ്ങൾ അടക്കപ്പെടുന്ന, പിശാചുക്കൾ ബന്ധിക്കപ്പെടുന്ന മാസം..റമദാൻ 🌙

ഈ അവസരം നഷ്ടപ്പെടുത്തരുത്..

✨ നമുക്ക് മാറ്റം സാധ്യമാണ് ✨

അഹ്‌ലൻ റമദാൻ പ്രഭാഷണം

🎙️ ഹുസൈൻ സലഫി

Wisdom Youth Kerala 

Ramadan Speech Malayalam | Hussain Salafi Latest Speech 2021 | Ahlan Ramadhan | Malayalam islamic speech | Nombu speech 
Ramalan Prabashanam | Salafi online speech | Latest islamic speech malayalam


അഹ്‌ലൻ റമദാൻ | ഹുസൈൻ സലഫി | റമളാൻ പ്രഭാഷണം | റമദാന് മുന്നൊരുക്കം | ഹുസൈൻ സലഫി പ്രഭാഷണം

snippet.title: ലോക്കഡൗൺ അറിയിപ്പ് സ്കൂളുകൾ അടയ്ക്കുന്നു നാളത്തെ പ്രധാന അറിയിപ്പുകൾ.
snippet.description:
ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയ,സാമുദായിക, മതപരമായ ഒരു വേർതിരിവുമില്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് സ്കീമുകൾ ഏത് നിമിഷവും എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം സംഭവിക്കാം . ആയതിനാൽ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്ഡേഷനുകൾ കാണുവാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക.
follow My facebook page https://www.facebook.com/Info-Media-Vlog-100434298313336

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 09 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

Hey guys Assalamualekum and welcome to the new video Kanjoos Admi.
Kanjoos rehne ka asar khud se jyada apne aajoo bajoo rehnewalon ke oopar rehti hai.
Kya hua? Kaise hua? Ye video mein dekhiye. koi experience hai toh comments mein hamako zaroor bathana.

filmmakers, storytellers, actors & technicians who share the passion for
film and media and want to learn by making their own projects in a
hands-on intensive program. To join the most exciting programs, apply
now https://bit.ly/2PMZfOg or call: +91 7793999126, +91 7793999127"

snippet.title: Maharashtra Corona Crisis: महाराष्ट्रात पूर्ण लॉकडाऊन? सर्वपक्षीय बैठकीत निर्णयाची शक्यता
snippet.description:
Maharashtra Corona Crisis कोरोनाच्या पार्श्वभूमीवर राज्यात मागील काही दिवसांपासून कठोर निर्बंध लागू केले जात आहेत. ज्यानंतर सर्व स्तरांतून नकारात्मक प्रतिक्रिया उमटू लागल्या. राज्यातील कोरोना स्थिती पाहता शनिवारी मुख्यमंत्र्यांच्या उपस्थितीत एक सर्वपक्षीय बैठक बोलवण्यात आली आहे. 

कोविड-१९ च्या पार्श्वभूमीवर प्रमुख राजकीय पक्षांच्या नेत्यांसमवेत दूरदृश्य प्रणालीद्वारे ही बैठक पार पडणार आहे. जिथं दहावी - बारावी बोर्डाच्या परीक्षांसंदर्भातही निर्णय़ घेतला जाणार आहे. त्याशिवाय राज्यात सध्या लागू असणारे निर्बंध आणखी कठोर केले जाणार की त्यामध्ये शिथिलता आणली जाणार यासंदर्भात निर्णय होणार आहेत.

snippet.title: HEADS UP CHALLENGE | DAMNFAM |
snippet.description:
Hey damnfans!🤍

First of all, sab ke sab ek frame me FINALLY!😻
Gear up for some crazy content coming your way!! 

In this video we played HEADS UP , so sit back & relax while you watch us act and jump like maniacs to make our respective teams win!!😂

See you next week!!

snippet.description:
#MorariBapu #RamKatha #Haridwar

Morari Bapu’s Ram Katha in Haridwar: 3rd April - 11th April 2021

Katha Chaupai:

हरि अनंत हरिकथा अनंता । कहहिं सुनहिं बहुबिधि सब संता ॥
hari anant harikatha anantaa | kahahi sunahi bahubidhi sab santaa ||

Bal Kand - Doha 140

द्वारपाल हरि के प्रिय दोऊ । जय अरु बिजय जान सब कोऊ ॥
dwarpaal hari ke priya dou | jay aru bijay jan sab kou ||

Bal Kand - Doha 122

---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 10 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 9th April 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 10 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 9th April 21

Your favourite Pakistani dramas are just a click away! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to never miss a video from our amazing YouTube channel that is now available in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: तासा दीड तासात "गुढीपाडवा थाळी" / ना अळूचा रोल ना वाटण, बनवा ही स्पेशल थाळी पट्कन। Gudhipada Thali
snippet.description:
कमी वेळात होणारी "गुढीपाडवा थाळी" / ना अळूचा रोल ना वाटण, बनवा ही स्पेशल थाळी पट्कन। Gudhipada Thali

गुढीपाडवा खास थाळी -
आमरस, कमी तेलकट पुरी, झटपट अळू वडी, चमचमीत आलू मटार भाजी

इथे सांगितलेला मेनू आपन कोणतेही वाटण न बनवता, अळू वडी रोल न करता, अगदी तासा दीड तासात तयार होईल अशी गुढी पाडवा स्पेशल थाळी.
जर आंबे उपलब्ध नसतील तर तुम्ही श्रीखंड पण बनवू शकता..

श्रीखंड रेसीपी - https://youtu.be/UTrKvrf1NMA

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: Think Twice Before Wearing Black Clothes - Sadhguru
snippet.description:
Fashionistas love black, but black comes with its pitfalls. Sadhguru speaks about the significance and dangers of wearing black, and tells us when we should absolutely avoid it. This video is an excerpt from the consecration of Adi Yogi – The Abode of Yoga, in Isha Institute of Inner-sciences, USA.

Fashionistas love black, but black comes with its pitfalls. Sadhguru speaks about the significance and dangers of wearing black, and tells us when we should absolutely avoid it. This video is an excerpt from the consecration of Adi Yogi – The Abode of Yoga, in Isha Institute of Inner-sciences, USA.

#Sadhguru
Yogi, mystic and visionary, Sadhguru is a spiritual master with a difference. An arresting blend of profundity and pragmatism, his life and work serves as a reminder that yoga is a contemporary science, vitally relevant to our times.

snippet.title: D’Evil - Kaancheck | Prod. By Karan Kanchan | Saurabh Ghadge, Just Neel Things, Focused Indian
snippet.description:
➟  Download & Stream: https://mai.lnk.to/kaancheck 
#Kaancheck is a colloquial term / slang for a ‘slap’. #DEvil narrates the flaws and vices in our society through a police inspector’s perspective and how some citizens deserve a ‘Kaancheck’ for being a menace to others.

Lyrics:
(Hook)
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, satt satt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, satt satt mein  
Satt satt mein, fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein, kaancheck

Ek kaan check
Do kaan check
Teen kaan check
Char kaan check
Fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein
Jhatt jhatt mein, satt satt mein
Fatke hai, fatke hai, kaancheck

(Verse 1)
Apan taan ke kheeche
Poore bambai ki aawaj 
Tere kaan ke neeche
Seedha thobde pe land
Tapamaan bhi theek hai
Ek chapati mein chote tu jhul dega
Lefty se fatka du
Right se khaali hull dega
Raste pe mootega
Patte se footega
Baccho ko lootega 
Jhatke mein tootega
Thukega gutkha 
Banadunga butka
Kaan ke neeche garam karke sekunga bhutta
Jab padati hai chaapti
Public hai kaapti
Sunega dus baat bhi fir maarenge laat bhi
Jo neta karega ghotale

Episode 3141: Chalo Pandey Investigates
---------------------------------------------------------
Popatlal files a complain against the Mango thief.. Chaloo Pandey enters the crime scene and gets to know about thye whole situation. In this whole mess Chaloo Pandey doubts the courier boy to know more watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Maharani | Official Teaser | SonyLIV Originals | Huma Qureshi | Streaming Soon
snippet.description:
A political drama set in Bihar of 90's. With its caste arithmetic, traditional satraps and the emerging voice...will an illiterate woman survive this?

#Maharani - Streaming soon only on #SonyLIV

Credits: 
Produced by: Dimple Kharbanda & Naren Kumar

snippet.title: Daya ने बनाया बैंगन का Burger | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Haste Raho
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Comedy: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBIT1FSJW6yTlzqK-31FDWg?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the comedy clips of your favorite shows: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLSXTaG1fT0cQDeknj5_H_O64mUh4_AAC5

Watch all the specially curated clips from your favorite shows and let the characters tickle your funny bone!

About The Show:
----------------------------
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is a comedy show inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chashmah' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This show revolves around Gada Family which consists of uneducated Businessman Jethalal Champaklal Gada, Jethalal’s Wife Daya & their naughty Son Tipendra Gada living in 'Gokuldham Co-operative Society' and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. In case of a problem and emergency, Jethalal Gada often rushes to Taarak Mehta to seek his help and guidance as he finds a philosopher in him. The residents of the housing society, help each other find solutions when they face common, real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

#tmkoc #taarakmehta

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1216 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
When Soumya is at the temple praying to the all-powerful gods, she expresses her wish to meet her long-lost love, Harman. Tune in to the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Rehearsal Session - Rama Nama Tharakam - Vande Guru Paramparaam
snippet.description:
Part of 'Vande Guru Paramparaam' - A Spiritual Musical Series. 

Music - Composed, Produced, Directed, Recorded, Mixed, Mastered, Video Edited & Harmonium by Kuldeep M Pai
http://kuldeepmpai.com
http://www.youtube.com/kuldeepmpai
http://www.facebook.com/kuldeepmpai
http://www.twitter.com/kuldeepmpai

© & ℗ 2021: Kuldeep M Pai
Licensee: Chith Foundation
All rights reserved. 

'Vande Guru Paramparaam' - a spiritual musical series produced by Sri Kuldeep M Pai is a genuine attempt at infusing the abundance of our cultural heritage in the younger generations. What better agency than Music can there be to inspire the young and aged alike? A team of talented kids spearheaded by Sooryagayathri, Rahul Vellal, Bhavya Ganapathi, Raghuram Manikandan and Paavani Cotah have played their parts in transferring the Transcendental Truth through their dulcet voices. The musical videos in this series have already won acclaim from millions of viewers across the globe. It's now time for us to bow before the lineage of Gurus and relish the beatitude of divine buoyancy. Vande Guru Paramparaam! Vande Guru Paramparaam!

snippet.title: Director Sukumar Speech At Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First Meet Event | Allu Arjun | Rashmika
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First meet on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​​ #PreludeOfPushparaj​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj​ #AlluArjun​​ #Rashmika​​ #Faasil​ #Sukumar​​ #DSP​ #MythriMovieMakers​​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Click here to watch:
Introducing Pushpa Raj : https://youtu.be/Lk2oDvoonUc
Prelude of Pushparaj: https://youtu.be/gbcpEbr6ECA

snippet.title: SIT | THE CONFUSION| Pyar Ka Punch | S2E14 | Pracheen Chauhan | Pooja Gor
snippet.description:
Meera misses her date and Abhimanyu and Meera realise that they may be pregnant. But it is not part of their plan and Meera is freaking out because of the pregnancy. After all, an unplanned pregnancy can throw away all your plans! Watch this funny and cute episode to know how the story proceeds!
THE CONFUSION
___________________________
Do SHARE the video if you LIKE it, and leave us a COMMENT! Don't forget to SUBSCRIBE to Shitty Ideas Trending for a fun video every Thursday! Also do participate in the contest to be an inseparable part of the SIT community!
Also subscribe to BE SAFE, a new endeavour by SIT. All about online crimes and how to safeguard yourself while on the internet.
https://www.youtube.com/besafebysit
__________________________
ABOUT SIT:
Shitty Ideas Trending is an endeavour to create entertaining videos which are not just funny but also hugely relatable. Husband wife comedy sketches, Web Series, relationship banter, couple humour, and even meaningful fictional short films every now and then. Whether you are glued to watching the cute and adorable husband Rishi with his wife Rohini, or the smart and suave Abhimanyu with his wife Meera, whether you love to watch the adorable yet eccentric maid Baby or are just addicted to little Jahaan’s smile, or maybe you like to get a dose of relationship tips from Abhimanyu or just want to avoid the mistakes that Rishi makes, SIT is the place for everybody who wishes to get a dose of entertainment when on the move. The videos are short and snackable and are for one and all. Ranging from THE BETTER HALF with Chhavi Mittal and Karan V Grover, PYAR KA PUNCH with Pracheen Chauhan and Pooja Gor, MAID IN HEAVEN with Shubhangi Litoria, or GRASS IS GREENER ON THE OTHER SIDE with a combination of Chhavi Mittal, Karan V Grover, Pracheen Chauhan, Pooja Gor, creator MOHIT HUSSEIN brings you a great mix of content.
__________________________

snippet.title: WB Election 2021 Voting: শীতলকুচিতে গুলিবিদ্ধ হয়ে মৃত চার, কান্নার রোল গোটা এলাকায়
snippet.description:
শীতলকুচির জোড় পাটকিতে গুলিবিদ্ধ ৫। সিআরপিএফ (CRPF)-এর বিরুদ্ধে গুলি চালানোর অভিযোগ উঠেছে। নিহতরা তাদের সমর্থক বলে দাবি করেছে তৃণমূল (TMC)। বিজেপির দালালি করছে সিআরপিএফ (CRPF)। অ্যাকশন টেকেন রিপোর্ট চাইল কমিশন।
#CRPF #WestBengaElection2021 #ABPAnandaLive

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 195
snippet.description:
Swara shows everyone the video footage of Ragini's kidnap and Sharmistha notices a veiled figure. Meanwhile, Ragini is able to free herself from her captivity and calls Shekhar up.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Official Trailer | Episode 1 Streaming Now
snippet.description:
UPSC - One of the toughest exams in the world. Nothing comes easy when you are preparing for it as an Aspirant. In Delhi's Old Rajinder Nagar, thousands of people come every year with a dream of becoming an IAS officer. It takes a lot of hard work, perseverance and discipline to crack it. But it also takes a lot of heart to endure the pressure. 

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life.

Unacademy & The Viral Fever present ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. Streaming from 7 April on YouTube.


Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar

Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat
Associate Director: Himali Shah
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti
Editor: Tushar Manocha
Music: Rohit Sharma
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan
Sound Design: Pranit Purao

UPSC fact #27: UPSC syllabus is so vast and diverse ke chahe jitna bhi try karlo Bunny kuch na kuch to chhutega hi!
-Description Guy. 

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt​ #UPSC

snippet.title: Choti Sarrdaarni | छोटी सरदारनी | Episode 450 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Sarabjeet lashes out at Sandhya for interfering in the family matter rather than taking care of Seher, but Sandhya holds her ground. Tune in to the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #ChotiSarrdaarni

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Meher is coerced by her mother into marrying Sarabjeet, a widower with a 5 year-old child. But, much to her mother’s dislike, Meher is pregnant with her lover, Manav’s child. Can she stand up for her love and fight her own? This is the journey of a strong-willed woman who makes her own rules and stands by them, come what may. Naag se badh kar Naagin, Sher se badh kar Sherni aur Sardar se badh kar Choti Sarrdaarni! Watch the fiercely independent sardani take on the world and protect her family in Choti Sarrdaarni.

snippet.title: क्या होगा अगर आप Chewing Gum निगल गए तो? What Happens When You Mistakenly Swallow a Gum? AMF Ep 49
snippet.description:
Do you know what exactly happens in your stomach after you mistakenly swallow a chewing gum?

Let us explore this in this episode of AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by Rajesh Kumar AKA FactTechz where we explore various amazing facts related to our amazing world. Know how enigmatic and astonishing our world is! This is the episode 49 of AMF.

snippet.title: കോവിഡിന്റെ രണ്ടാംതരംഗം പടരുന്നു. ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട 5 പ്രധാന കാര്യങ്ങൾ.  ഷെയർ ചെയ്തു പ്രചരിപ്പിക്കുക
snippet.description:
ഇന്ത്യയിൽ കോവിഡിന്റെ രണ്ടാം തരംഗം വലിയ വേഗതയിൽ പടരുന്നു. ഒരു ദിവസം 1,25,000 രോഗികൾ എന്ന രീതിയിൽ രോഗികൾ വീണ്ടും കൂടുകയാണ്. കേരളത്തിലും കോവിഡ് രോഗികളുടെ എണ്ണം കൂടിത്തുടങ്ങി. എന്തുകൊണ്ട് ഇന്ത്യയിൽ രണ്ടാം തരംഗം വേഗത്തിൽ പടരുന്നു. 
0:00 Start
2:20 രണ്ടാം തരംഗം വലിയ വേഗതയിൽ പടരുന്നുത് എന്തു കൊണ്ട്?
4:17 വാക്സിന്‍ രോഗവ്യാപനം കുറയ്ക്കുമോ?
6:30 രണ്ടാം തരംഗം ഇപ്പോള്‍ പടരുന്നത് എവിടെ?
9:00 ജാഗ്രത കൈവിടരുത് 
12:15 എങ്ങനെ തടയാം



ഇത് എത്രയും പെട്ടെന്ന് നിയന്ത്രണത്തിൽ കൊണ്ടുവരാൻ നാം ഉടൻ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട 5 പ്രധാന കാര്യങ്ങൾ വിശദമായി അറിയുക.. ഈ ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ പൊതുസമൂഹത്തിന്റെ അറിവിലേക്കായി പരമാവധി വേഗത്തിൽ ഷെയർ ചെയ്തു ജനങ്ങളെ ബോധവൽക്കരിക്കുക. 
#Corona #Covid19 #CovidVaccine 


For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: Those Annoying Little Things | Comedy | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
“I think it’s important to find the little things in everyday life that make you happy.” – Paula Cole

Concept & Production
